7mate.synopsis: On the run and with a price on his head, wanted criminal Riddick must stop an evil army that plans to kill all humans in the universe. (2004)

7mate.title: Blokesworld
7mate.synopsis: Ado and Camera 89 continue across Japan, stopping at Motorcycles and Coffee in Yukuhashi. Back in Australia, Scott buys his first V8 at 60, and we visit the Performance Pulse Expo in Brisbane.

7mate.title: Border Security: International
7mate.synopsis: An irate traveller in Montreal puts officers to the test. Fruit belonging to a pair of Canadians returning from Haiti may be packed with more than nutrition.

7mate.title: Border Security: International
7mate.synopsis: A belly dancer tries to shimmy across the US border. Officers are puzzled by a man carrying a human skull. Narrated by Grant Bowler.

7mate.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
7mate.synopsis: An entire flight from Vietnam is suspected of drug smuggling, a sniffer dog finds a package and two students with little luggage cause suspicion.

7mate.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
7mate.synopsis: A mysterious passenger has Customs baffled, a cigarette smoker blows his stack, and the Mail Centre has just made a shocking discovery.

7mate.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
7mate.synopsis: Customs suspect that a family are using their children as drug pawns and target a billion dollar criminal industry being shipped to our shores.

7mate.title: Ax Men
7mate.synopsis: With the logging season halfway through, Stump Branch tests a new, but more dangerous, logging strategy which poses a great danger to the men in the rigging.

7mate.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
7mate.synopsis: LIVE Day 8 coverage continues with Emma Freedman and Matt Shirvington presenting the best of the action, along with Mel McLaughlin and Jason Richardson joining live from Glasgow with guests.

7mate.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
7mate.synopsis: LIVE Day 8 coverage continues with Emma Freedman and Matt Shirvington presenting the best of the action, along with Mel McLaughlin and Jason Richardson joining live from Glasgow with guests.

7mate.title: The Fishing Show
7mate.synopsis: The team continue their adventure on the Snowy River, catching a haul of big Bass, as one of the younger guides joins in on the fishing. Later, they get some great strategies for Jewfish up north.

7mate.title: Garage 41
7mate.synopsis: An exploration of the all-electric Porsche and its 2020 release in Australia; Dave examines a 1932 hot rod.

7mate.title: Counting Cars
7mate.synopsis: Danny attempts to get the derailed '62 Caddy project back on track; Ryan tries to make up for a mishap by finding a flip or two for the shop.

7mate.title: Counting Cars
7mate.synopsis: Danny wants to turn a 1967 Mustang into a custom masterpiece of his own; Shannon and Roli meet a classic couple.
